creator: yanhui.he@broadcom.com
text:
Created attachment 255382
FreeBSD 14.2 Beta3 amd64 ISO Image cannot be installed

As title, FreeBSD 14.2 Beta3 amd64 ISO Image cannot be installed in vSphere with reporting "Operating System not found" as attached screenshot with the name of "FreeBSD 14.2 Beta3 amd64 ISO Image cannot be used.png".

The following pre-releases are OK for FreeBSD 14.2.
Beta1: 32bit and 64bit with *-disc1.iso
Beta2: 32bit and 64bit with *-dvd1.iso
Beta3: 32bit with *-dvd1.iso

It's serious problem for FreeBSD 14.2 installation on vSphere. Currently, we only tested on vSphere 8.x and vSphere next.

Please kindly to check this problem and fix it.

I'll also re-check it when the next pre-release of FreeBSD 14.2 RC1 release.

If Bug's Component is not appropriate, please kindly help to change it.

Thanks!
